DECLARATION OF LAWRENCE HECIMOVICH IN SUPPORT OF DONE GLOBALS OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO STRIKE (TRANSACTION ID # 77872681) FILED BY DEFENDANT DONE GLOBAL, INC. , A DELAWARE CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DAVID BRODY'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINITFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT DONE GLOBAL, INC.'S ANSWER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF MET AND CONFERRED WITH DEFENDANT PRIOR TO FILING THE MOTION AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 435.5. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/CM)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Set For Trial On Feb-08-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Continued To Mar-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID BRODY's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Plainitff's motion to strike Defendant Done Global, Inc.'s Answer to Amended Complaint is DENIED. Plaintiff's motion fails to demonstrate that Plaintiff met and conferred with Defendant prior to filing the motion as required by Code of Civil Procedure 435.5.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)
